query: SELECT c.nome as categoria, COUNT(*) as linhas, SUM(l.totalAnual) as totalAnual FROM orcamento_planejado_linhas l JOIN orcamento_categorias c ON c.id = l.categoriaId WHERE l.versaoId = 1 GROUP BY c.nome ORDER BY totalAnual DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4X2C2Km2DVLwNTk.c1886cf7bd86 --database GdPAuRogRcNPzV7ENB2n8s --execute SELECT c.nome as categoria, COUNT(*) as linhas, SUM(l.totalAnual) as totalAnual FROM orcamento_planejado_linhas l JOIN orcamento_categorias c ON c.id = l.categoriaId WHERE l.versaoId = 1 GROUP BY c.nome ORDER BY totalAnual DESC LIMIT 20;
